name: SpecAgent
description: Multi-skill spec compliance agent with 8 skills exercising all A2A v1.0 patterns: message-only, task-lifecycle, task-failure, task-cancel, multi-turn, streaming, long-running, and data-types.

name: EchoAgent
description: Minimal echo agent that returns your message back. Validates multi-agent hosting and provides a baseline sanity check.

name: SpecAgent (v0.3)
description: Same SpecAgent but serves a v0.3-format agent card. Tests SDK backward compatibility with protocolVersion 0.3.0. JSON-RPC only, no REST binding.
